action.reasoning: Observation: I'm still getting a FileNotFoundError because the image path is incorrect. The error shows '/data/images/images/showui-3c3972f322ab.png' which has a double 'images' in the path. Looking at the data again, the 'image_path' field in the JSONL already includes 'images/' prefix, so I shouldn't prepend another 'images/' directory. I need to fix the dataset to use the image_path directly without adding another 'images/' prefix. I also need to complete the DataCollator implementation which was truncated.
